overview: TaskFlow is a premium productivity todo app built on the Internet Computer. It features Internet Identity authentication, per-user task isolation, glassmorphism UI, category sidebar, priority labels, and a real-time completion progress bar.
features: Glassmorphism UI with frosted glass cards and sidebar
Category sidebar: Work, Personal, Urgent task filtering
Priority labels per task: High, Medium, Low with color coding
Real-time completion progress bar at the top
Responsive design for mobile and desktop
